title: grewia tembensis var. tembensis
intro: Grewia tembensis var. tembensis, also known as the African plum or wild plum, is a plant species that belongs to the family Malvaceae. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to tropical Africa, with medicinal properties attributed to its leaves, bark, and fruits. The plant is valued for its anthelmintic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to provide relief from various health issues such as fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions. The leaves and fruits of the plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and are also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
